settings.name: access_mode
settings.description: Access mode of the database (AUTOMATIC, READ_ONLY or READ_WRITE)

settings.name: max_temp_directory_size
settings.description: The maximum amount of data stored inside the 'temp_directory' (when set) (e.g. 1GB)

settings.name: memory_limit
settings.description: The maximum memory of the system (e.g. 1GB)

settings.name: temp_directory
settings.description: Set the directory to which to write temp files

settings.name: threads
settings.description: The number of total threads used by the system.
